summary: Fix unreadable text in the Add TODO modal by adding explicit Tailwind text/placeholder colors to the heading and three form controls, and translate the Add/Close buttons to 追加/キャンセル. All changes are confined to components/AddTodoModal.tsx.

required_changes.change: On the <h2> at line 29, add `text-gray-900` to its className (preserve existing `text-lg font-bold mb-4`).
required_changes.reason: Defensive contrast fix — ensures the heading is readable on the white modal background regardless of inherited color.
acceptance_criteria: Existing classes text-lg, font-bold, mb-4 are preserved

required_changes.change: Add `text-gray-900 placeholder-gray-500` to the className of each of the three form controls: the title <input type="text"> (line 30), the details <textarea> (line 37), and the deadline <input type="date"> (line 43). Preserve their existing `w-full mb-2 p-2 border rounded` classes.
required_changes.reason: The issue reports input text and placeholders rendering white-on-white. Explicit Tailwind utilities guarantee dark typed text and a visible gray placeholder.
acceptance_criteria: All three form controls include text-gray-900 and placeholder-gray-500 in their className
Typed text in each control is visibly dark on the white modal background
Placeholder text in the title and details fields is visibly gray (not white)

required_changes.change: Replace the visible text of the primary button (currently `Add`, line 51) with `追加`, and the visible text of the secondary button (currently `Close`, line 54) with `キャンセル`. Do not change onClick handlers or className values.
required_changes.reason: Issue explicitly requests Japanese button labels.
acceptance_criteria: The primary action button displays the text 追加
The secondary button displays the text キャンセル
Button handlers (handleAdd, onClose) and styles are unchanged

out_of_scope: Translating the modal heading 'Add New TODO'
Form validation, accessibility, or layout refactors
Edits to styles/globals.css, tailwind.config.js, or any other component or page
risks: Low risk — changes are limited to className strings and button text in a single component; no logic, props, or types are modified.
open_questions: Whether the heading 'Add New TODO' should also be translated; current plan leaves it unchanged because the issue does not request it.
